action.reasoning: Observation: Global utility/(dist+1)+BFS heuristic gets perfect local proxy (success=1.0, explored=1.0, proxy_score=0.7575 on 6 maps) but full harness eval fails (score=0, total_episodes=0) due to truncated/incomplete predict.py (syntax errors, missing robust config parsing, no guaranteed metrics/JSON on errors, UnboundLocalError). Prior myopic baseline only 0.0196. Analysis: Heuristic is strong, standard frontier-based planner fully compatible with real ExplorationEnv (0 params, uses provided nodes graph, respects all rules <=50M). Root cause is predict.py not handling eval_config.json + maps_eval/ properly or exceptions. Decision: Overwrite with COMPLETE robust predict.py (full select_waypoint+run_evaluation, config fallback to glob maps_eval or train subset, try/except per-episode, exact JSON contract with per_type success-only distances, always write output, proxy print). Update train.py version, run train+local test to validate, submit_eval on fixed checkpoint to get official score on 150 maps and measure time.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
